unit: Unit 8: Apps and the App Store
title: Free vs Paid Apps
drDigitalIntro: Some apps are free forever. Others cost a one-time price. Some have a free version with limited features and a paid version for more. Subscriptions charge regularly (monthly or yearly) for ongoing access. In-app purchases let you unlock features within an app by paying. Read app descriptions to understand what you're paying for. Free doesn't always mean good — paid apps often have better quality and fewer ads.
drDigitalHint: Always check what you're getting before spending money.
